title: Textiles Designed for Daily Hotel Use
description: A practical showroom of core hospitality textile categories. Every entry can be edited, hidden, reordered, or replaced from Decap CMS.

items.title: Bed Sheets
items.shortDescription: High-quality bed sheets designed for comfort, durability, and professional hotel use.

items.title: Pillow Covers
items.shortDescription: Clean, durable pillow covers available for different hospitality needs.

items.title: Duvet Covers
